languages.text: За пропажей Торгового Патента стоит Тразин Неисчислимый, от заключения которого Лорд-капитан ранее освободил{mf||а} Себериана. Ксенос передал, что вернет Патент в обмен на предка {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости — и для заключения сделки ожидает Вольного Торговца в одной из систем за запретными варп-вратами.

The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.
languages.original_text: За пропажей Торгового Патента стоит Тразин Неисчислимый, от заключения которого Лорд-капитан ранее освободил{mf||а} Себериана. Ксенос передал, что вернет Патент в обмен на предка {mf|Его|Ее} Светлости — и для заключения сделки ожидает Вольного Торговца в одной из систем за запретными варп-вратами.

The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

languages.text: 貿易証書が消えたのは、トラズン・ザ・インフィニットという異種族のせいです。彼は以前、シベリアを捕らえていたのですが、ロード・キャプテンが解放したのです。この異種族は、陛下の祖先を差し出す代わりに、貿易証書を返すと伝えており、今は禁断のワープゲートの向こうの星系の一つで、取引を待っています。
languages.original_text: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

traits.locale_text: 貿易証書が消えたのは、トラズン・ザ・インフィニットという異種族のせいです。彼は以前、シベリアを捕らえていたのですが、ロード・キャプテンが解放したのです。この異種族は、{mf|彼の Lordship|彼女の Lordship}の祖先を差し出す代わりに、貿易証書を返すと伝えており、今は禁断のワープゲートの向こうの星系の一つで、取引を待っています。

languages.text: El responsable de la desaparición de la Patente de Comercio es Trazyn el Infinito, de cuyas manos {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán rescató a Seberian. El xenos ha comunicado que devolverá la Patente a cambio del antepasado de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán, y ahora espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en uno de los sistemas al otro lado del portal de disformidad prohibido para cerrar el trato.
languages.original_text: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

traits.locale_text: El responsable de la desaparición de la Patente de Comercio es Trazyn el Infinito, de cuyas manos {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán rescató a Seberian. El xenos ha comunicado que devolverá la Patente a cambio del antepasado de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán, y ahora espera a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente en uno de los sistemas al otro lado del portal de disformidad prohibido para cerrar el trato.

languages.text: Der für das Verschwinden des Handelsbriefs verantwortliche Übeltäter ist Trazyn der Unendliche, aus dessen Gefangenschaft der Lord Captain Seberian befreit hat. Der Xenos hat angeboten, den Handelsbrief gegen den Vorfahren {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft} auszutauschen ... und erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} nun in einem der Systeme jenseits des verbotenen Warptors, um den Handel abzuschließen.
languages.original_text: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

traits.locale_text: Der für das Verschwinden des Handelsbriefs verantwortliche Übeltäter ist Trazyn der Unendliche, aus dessen Gefangenschaft der Lord Captain Seberian befreit hat. Der Xenos hat angeboten, den Handelsbrief gegen den Vorfahren {mf|Seiner Lordschaft|Ihrer Ladyschaft} auszutauschen ... und erwartet {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} nun in einem der Systeme jenseits des verbotenen Warptors, um den Handel abzuschließen.

languages.text: Le responsable de la disparition de la lettre de marque n'est autre que Trazyn l'Infini, qui retenait Seberian captif jusqu'à sa libération par {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}. Le xénos a indiqué qu'il ne rendrait la lettre de marque qu'en échange de l'ancêtre {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. Pour procéder à l'échange, il vous a donné rendez-vous dans un système situé au-delà du portail du Warp interdit.
languages.original_text: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

traits.locale_text: Le responsable de la disparition de la lettre de marque n'est autre que Trazyn l'Infini, qui retenait Seberian captif jusqu'à sa libération par {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine}. languages.text: 贸易授状失踪的罪魁祸首乃是“无限者”特拉金——此前，舰长大人正是从他手中营救了塞贝里安。该异形已声明了条件：他愿意归还贸易授状，交换条件是舰长大人的先祖。如今，他正在那道被封禁的亚空间之门彼端的某个星系中，等待与行商浪人完成交易。
languages.original_text: The one responsible for the disappearance of the Warrant of Trade is Trazyn the Infinite, from whose captivity the Lord Captain previously liberated Seberian. The xenos has relayed that he will return the Warrant in exchange for {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s ancestor — and he now awaits the Rogue Trader in one of the systems beyond the forbidden warp gate to conclude the deal.

languages.text: Ticari Ruhsatname'nin kaybolmasından sorumlu kişi, Lord Kaptan'ın daha önce Seberian'ı esaretinden kurtardığı Sonsuz Trazyn'miş. Zeno, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin atası karşılığında Ruhsatname'yi geri vereceğini iletti. Şimdi anlaşmayı tamamlamak için yasak öteboyut kapısının ötesindeki sistemlerden birinde Hür Tacir'i bekliyor.
